prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约427名、438名、442名、454名、449名，整体在420–455名区间窄幅波动，近5年累计后移约22名；2025年基准位次约449名，较2024年略有回升，显示位次基本稳定；2021–2024年理科计划均为48–56人，2025年物理类计划增至64人；2026年物理类计划大幅缩减至40人，较2025年减少24人（缩招37.5%），缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第5名，2022–2026年稳定第6名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及食堂管理事件（帝王蟹定价争议、专硕不提供宿舍），但属局部管理问题，未动摇学校整体声誉；抖音热度排名第17（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常信号仅2022年有中关注（专业组差异），未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达26个，其中天文学、地质学、地理学、大气科学、中国语言文学、外国语言文学、物理学、化学、计算机科学与技术、工商管理获评A+，学科实力极强；人工智能、计算机等王牌专业与招生大类高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，人工智能专业谨慎观望但关注度高；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，属东部发达地区，对山西考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次窄幅稳定、2026年物理类计划大幅缩招37.5%（竞争加剧核心因素）、考生总数小幅下降（缓解因素）及学校顶尖层次带来的持续高关注度；预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约358名，区间317–399名。

- 计算机科学与技术。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约358名，区间317–399名。建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报（电子信息类、数理科学类、软件工程），一档专业（人工智能、匡亚明大理科班、计算机科学与技术）作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（317名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（399名附近）建议以三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 427, 438, 442, 454, and 449 respectively, fluctuating narrowly within the 420–455 range, with a cumulative backward shift of about 22 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 449, slightly recovering compared to 2024, indicating basic stability; from 2021 to 2024, the Science enrollment plan was 48–56 students, and in 2025, the Physics Category plan increased to 64 students; in 2026, the Physics Category plan sharply decreased to 40 students, a reduction of 24 students (a 37.5% decrease) compared to 2025, a significant contraction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the 2021 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, firmly among the top universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria management incidents (king crab pricing controversy, no dormitory for professional master's students), but these are local management issues that have not shaken the overall reputation; Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention for applications; historical abnormal admission signals only in 2022 with moderate attention (differences in major groups), no obvious gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 26 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Astronomy, Geology, Geography, Atmospheric Science, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Language and Literature, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, and Business Administration rated A+, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength; top majors like Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science are highly aligned with enrollment categories.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with social popularity, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed but with high attention; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, which is attractive to Shanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow stability of historical rankings, the significant 37.5% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (core factor intensifying competition), a slight decrease in total examinees (mitigating factor), and the sustained high attention due to the school's top tier; predicts the minimum ranking for 2026 Science/Physics Category to be approximately 358, with a range of 317–399.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 358, range 317–399. It is recommended that examinees within the range primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Mathematical and Physical Sciences, Software Engineering), with Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence, Kuang Yaming General Science Class, Computer Science and Technology) as reach targets; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 317) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; those with rankings near the upper limit (around 399) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 81, 100, 147, 115, and 123 respectively, with significant fluctuation (range of 66). In 2023, it shifted back to 147, but stabilized in the 115–123 range in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 123; the liberal arts enrollment plan was 12 students in 2021–2022, increased to 16 in 2023–2024, and 15 for history category in 2025; the history category enrollment plan for 2026 increases to 18, an increase of 3 students (20% expansion) compared to 2025, which will alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the 2021 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable at 6th from 2022 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving a cafeteria management incident, which is a local issue; Douyin popularity ranking 17th (high heat), indicating high application attention; historical admission anomaly signals only in 2022 with medium attention (major group differences), no obvious gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 26 disciplines are rated A- or above, with liberal arts related: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A, Law A, Sociology A, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A; discipline strength is top-tier.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors are socially recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province in 2026 is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, greatly alleviating competition; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, which has strong appeal to Shanxi liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 115–123 in recent years, the 20% expansion of history category enrollment in 2026 (alleviating competition), the significant 25.6% decrease in total examinees (double benefit), and the sustained high attention due to the university's top-tier status; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 is approximately 143, with a range of 113–173.
